Actions.Text: ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.441

Title: Relates to the form of submission and abstract for proposed amendments to the constitution
Summary: Authorizes the form of submission and abstract for proposed amendments to the constitution submitted to the people to be determined by enactment in a separate joint resolution passed by both houses of the legislature at least 120 days prior to the general election where such amendment to the constitution shall be submitted.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the election law, in relation to the form of submission and abstract for proposed amendments to the constitution
